candidates.why: Direct total current assets line on the balance sheet; exactly matches ACT.
Appears to be a malformed subtotal combining sections, not the clean current-assets total.

variables.notes: Selected the clean reported total for current assets.

candidates.why: Direct balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line; preferred over cash-flow statement beginning/end cash lines.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents end of period
candidates.why: Cash-flow statement ending cash, but CHE should come from balance sheet when available.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at beginning of period
candidates.why: Beginning-of-period cash is not the balance-sheet current-year cash balance.
Direct total current liabilities line on the balance sheet; exactly matches LCT.
Appears to be a malformed combined subtotal rather than clean current liabilities.

variables.notes: Selected the clean reported total for current liabilities.

candidates.why: In the current-liabilities section this appears to represent current borrowings/short-term bank debt; appropriate for STD and excludes lease lines.
Also listed in the current-liabilities section and can represent current portion of debt; include as component when no single clean total current debt line is provided.
Supplemental maturity disclosure for debt due within one year, but likely overlaps with current debt lines and is less clean than primary balance-sheet items.
Contains lease liabilities, which should be excluded from STD under baseline rule.

candidates.row_label: Capital Lease Maturities - Due within 1 Year
candidates.why: Lease-related current maturities; explicitly excluded from STD.

variables.notes: No single clean total short-term debt label was provided. Selected the current financing-liability components from the balance sheet and excluded lease-related rows.

candidates.why: Current tax payable line within current liabilities section; best match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.

variables.notes: Used the balance-sheet current tax liability line, not cash taxes paid from the cash-flow statement.

candidates.why: Direct total PPE line on the balance sheet; preferred total/net PPE measure.

candidates.row_label: Property plant and Equipment in Progress Net
candidates.why: Only a component of PPE, not total PPE.

candidates.row_label: Property plant and Equipment in Progress
candidates.why: Only a component of PPE, not total PPE.
Lease-related component, not the preferred total PPE line.

variables.notes: Selected the direct total PPE line.

candidates.why: Direct total assets line on the balance sheet; best match for AT.
Accounting identity total but not the asset label itself; less preferred when Assets exists.

variables.notes: Chose label outside shortlist; confident because it is the explicit total assets line.

candidates.why: Direct net cash flow from operating activities line; standard match for OANCF.
Not a standard operating cash flow label and appears to be a subtotal.

variables.notes: Chose label outside shortlist; confident because it is the direct operating cash flow total.
